response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio perfectly matches the provided reference lyrics for 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for the song transcription. The video begins with the interlude hook, so the first four lines of the provided lyrics were omitted. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal activation. Visual events (Attention cards) are subtitled during instrumental breaks to provide context for concert-goers.

subtitles.original: Ridin' on Dreams - hololive 7th fes.
subtitles.english: [Title: Ridin' on Dreams - hololive 7th fes.]

subtitles.original: Yeah！！Wow oh oh…Hey！！ (Hey！！) Hey！！ (Hey！！)Yeah！！
subtitles.english: Yeah!! Wow oh oh... Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!) Yeah!!

subtitles.original: あぁ 小さな夢から想像できないような想いになったんだ
subtitles.english: Ah, a small dream turned into feelings I couldn't have imagined.

subtitles.original: わくわく止まらない！
subtitles.english: The excitement won't stop!

subtitles.original: 何度迷ったって僕ら絆が舵になる
subtitles.english: No matter how many times we get lost, our bond becomes our rudder.

subtitles.original: ちょっとの不安だってさ吹き飛ばせちゃうんだよ
subtitles.english: Even a little bit of anxiety, we can just blow it away.

subtitles.original: 果てない旅路を今漕いでる途中に困難もあるでしょう
subtitles.english: There will surely be hardships as we row through this endless journey.

subtitles.original: それも力に変えて一緒に進むんだよ！
subtitles.english: Let's turn that into strength and move forward together!

subtitles.original: ねえ、君がいたからだよ
subtitles.english: Hey, it's because you were there.

subtitles.original: ねえ、夢では終われない
subtitles.english: Hey, it can't end as just a dream.

subtitles.original: 荒波も乗り越えていこう “らしく” 輝いていたい
subtitles.english: Let's overcome the rough waves, I want to keep shining as myself.

subtitles.original: ねえ、君と会えたことが
subtitles.english: Hey, the fact that I met you...

subtitles.original: ねえ、宝物だ から
subtitles.english: ...is a treasure to me.

subtitles.original: 手を取り合い 声かけ合って 地図など無い 未知の世界で
subtitles.english: Holding hands, calling out to each other, in an unknown world with no map.

subtitles.original: まだまだ行こう！Ridin' on Dreams
subtitles.english: Let's keep going! Ridin' on Dreams.

subtitles.original: Wow oh oh…Hey！！ (Hey！！) Hey！！ (Hey！！)Yeah！！
subtitles.english: Wow oh oh... Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!) Yeah!!

subtitles.original: 急な風が僕らの行く先乱そうとも
subtitles.english: Even if a sudden wind tries to disturb our path,

subtitles.original: あの日誓ったんだ覚悟は揺ルがない
subtitles.english: I made a vow that day, my resolve will not waver.

subtitles.original: ちゃんとしなきゃ！って背中明日への橋になる
subtitles.english: Thinking "I have to do this right!" becomes a bridge to tomorrow.

subtitles.original: もっと大事にしなきゃね “あたりまえ”は無いから
subtitles.english: I have to cherish it more, because nothing is taken for granted.

subtitles.original:
演出の都合上 照明の点滅にご注意ください
声出し応援 OK です
subtitles.english: [Notice: Please be aware of flashing lights during the performance. Cheering loudly is OK.]

subtitles.original: 小さな船から始まるストーリー
subtitles.english: A story starting from a small ship.

subtitles.original: Wow oh oh oh oh oh 未完成も愛して
subtitles.english: Wow oh oh oh oh oh, love even the imperfections.

subtitles.original: Wow oh oh oh oh oh 想いは一つだ
subtitles.english: Wow oh oh oh oh oh, our feelings are as one.

subtitles.original: Wow oh oh oh oh oh 僅かな希望でも
subtitles.english: Wow oh oh oh oh oh, even with just a sliver of hope,

subtitles.original: 僕と 君で ずっと 馬鹿にされても 信じたい！
subtitles.english: You and me, forever, I want to believe even if they make fun of us!

subtitles.original: ねえ、ありがとうじゃ足りない
subtitles.english: Hey, "thank you" isn't enough.

subtitles.original: ねえ、想いが溢れちゃうんだよ ずっと一緒だよ！
subtitles.english: Hey, my feelings are overflowing, we'll be together forever!

subtitles.original: ねえ、君がいたからだよ
subtitles.english: Hey, it's because you were there.

subtitles.original: ねえ、夢では終われない
subtitles.english: Hey, it can't end as just a dream.

subtitles.original: 荒波も乗り越えていこう “らしく” 輝いていたい
subtitles.english: Let's overcome the rough waves, I want to keep shining as myself.

subtitles.original: ねえ、君と会えたことが
subtitles.english: Hey, the fact that I met you,

subtitles.original: ねえ、宝物だから
subtitles.english: is a treasure to me.

subtitles.original: 手を取り合い 声かけ合って 地図など無い 未知の世界で
subtitles.english: Holding hands, calling out to each other, in an unknown world with no map.

subtitles.original: まだまだ行けるから！
subtitles.english: Because we can still keep going!

subtitles.original: ひとりじゃない 何度でも立ち上がってさ
subtitles.english: You're not alone, we'll stand up again and again.

subtitles.original: 笑い合っていたい 願ねがいだって みんなで、さあ！
subtitles.english: I want to keep laughing together, even our wishes, all of us together, come on!

subtitles.original: 手を繋いで 想像も超えて
subtitles.english: Holding hands, going beyond imagination,

subtitles.original: まだまだ行こう！Ridin' on Dreams
subtitles.english: let's keep going! Ridin' on Dreams.

subtitles.original: Wow oh oh…Hey！！ (Hey！！) Hey！！ (Hey！！)Yeah！！
subtitles.english: Wow oh oh... Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!) Yeah!!
